title: Event-based Order
description: An event is any environmental observation of significance.

definitions.definition: An event is any environmental observation of significance.
definitions.notes: There are two use cases for event based orders. 1) Observations from a particular event (time, space, variable) 2) Using an event observed in one dataset to order/subset data from another dataset. Might require an order processor or AI
definitions.sources:
- NCEI/DAB - OSGS/CLASS
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
